text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I have to make up my mind soon... Should I run in it, or should I not? Should I run in it? Or should I not?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm running in it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer musters up the courage to throw
her hat into the ring for the first race of the
Classic Triple Crown, the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Good to see you here, Palmer. I'm real glad to run
with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, same! Let's go all out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I really am happy to be here, but that's not all
I'm feeling... What is it? It feels like... No way.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I'm... I'm a little scared too. I've been racing Ryan
since we were kids and never managed to beat
her... And now, she's my rival.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho... Honestly, my knees are
trembling from how nervous I am for this... But
just having you here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's real comforting somehow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm... comforting?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I mean, ever since we were kids, you always
managed to sort things out no matter what was
going on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I feel like everything's gonna be fine with you
around, even in a big event like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this is so frustrating...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Here I am, treating Ryan as an equal and a rival,
but she doesn't even register me as a threat.
Still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Part of me is happy she said I'm comforting to
have around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I kind of hate that part of myself... Or I guess it's more like I don't want to keep being like this.
choice_data_list: Then you should run away from that position.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Run away, huh? You're right. Even now, I'm still
just the Mejiros' peacekeeper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But that's not what I wanna be! So you know
what?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I will run away from my past self. I'm going to keep running as far as my current self can go!
